description_long: This is a modern electronic drum kit, featuring a sturdy metal frame supporting multiple drum pads and cymbal pads arranged in a semi-circular configuration. The kit includes two large round cymbal pads mounted on adjustable arms, several smaller drum pads for snare and toms, and a dedicated hi-hat pad. A compact electronic drum module is attached to the left side, with visible cables connecting the pads for signal transmission. The set also includes a padded drum stool and a foot pedal, likely for the bass drum. The overall design is sleek and functional, with a predominantly dark color scheme and a professional appearance suitable for both practice and performance.
description: A modern electronic drum kit with multiple drum and cymbal pads, a control module, and a drum stool, all mounted on a robust metal frame. The set is dark-colored and designed for professional use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of drum and cymbal pads, the control module on the left, and the supporting frame.
description_view_1: Left-angled view highlighting the depth of the kit, the side profile of the drum stool, and the visible wiring.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the drum pads, the stool, and the pedal, with the frame structure clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right-angled view emphasizing the right cymbal pad, the side of the stool, and the frame's support legs.
